Parts can inserted top .Rmd file, first-level chapter heading file.Add numbered part: # (PART) Act one {-} (followed # chapter)Add unnumbered part: # (PART\*) Act one {-} (followed # chapter)Add appendix special kind un-numbered part: # (APPENDIX) stuff {-} (followed # chapter). heading: 4.1 Footnotes

heading: 4.2 Citations
text:
Reference items bibliography file(s) using @key.example, using bookdown package2 (check last code chunk index.Rmd see citation key added) sample book, built top R Markdown knitr3 (citation added manually external file book.bib).
Note .bib files need listed index.Rmd YAML bibliography key.bs4_book theme makes footnotes appear inline click . example book, added csl: chicago-fullnote-bibliography.csl index.Rmd YAML, include .csl file. download new style, recommend: https://www.zotero.org/styles/RStudio Visual Markdown Editor can also make easier insert citations: https://rstudio.github.io/visual-markdown-editing/#/citations

heading: 7.1 Thank You Emails After an Interview
7.1.1 Why Sending a Thank You Message Matters
text: Sending thank message interview just polite gesture — strategic step hiring process.well-written thank message:Reinforces interest roleShows professionalism communication skillsHelps interviewer remember youGives chance clarify expand something discussedDemonstrates follow-attention detailIn competitive roles, small signals matter. thoughtful message can differentiate candidates similar qualifications.

heading: 7.1.2.1 1. Formal Email Example
text:
Subject: Thank – Software Engineer InterviewDear [Interviewer’s Name],Thank taking time speak today Software Engineer position. enjoyed learning team’s work scalable backend systems collaborative culture company.discussion optimizing distributed systems particularly excited , love opportunity contribute initiatives.Please let know anything can provide. look forward hearing .Best regards,
[Name]

heading: 7.1.2.2 2. LinkedIn Message Example
text:
Hi [Name],Thank speaking today Software Engineer role. really enjoyed conversation team’s approach building high-impact products.appreciate time look forward staying touch!Best,
[Name]

heading: 7.1.3 Thank You Message Checklist
text: Sent within 24 hoursAddressed interviewer nameMentioned something specific conversationReaffirmed interest roleMaintained professional toneChecked spelling grammar errorsIncluded clear closing name
